q3: The bowl description was the biggest sticking point — it kept defaulting to food-writing shorthand like 'rich and cloudy' that doesn't actually make you taste anything, and I had to push specifically for something more physical and unexpected before it clicked. There was also a moment where it tried to talk me out of adding more sensory texture to the room, which felt a little like it was defending its own draft rather than listening to me — though I'll admit it had a point when it pushed back.
